title: Data quality for 2018 Census | Stats NZ
content:
## Data quality for 2018 Census
The collection response rate for 2018 Census was lower than expected. So we introduced new methods to produce the dataset, including using data from alternative sources. Find information from both Stats NZ and the 2018 Census external data quality panel (EDQP) to help you understand the quality of the 2018 Census dataset.
- Stats NZ data quality information
- EDQP data quality information
- More census information and data

## Stats NZ data quality information
Ratings of the quality of the 2018 Census data, and information about the processes and data sources we used to improve the quality.

## Families and households in the 2018 Census: Data sources, family coding, and data quality
Describes the data sources and family coding process used to produce 2018 Census household and family information, and summarises our detailed assessment of the quality of this data.

## Data quality ratings for 2018 Census variables
Summarises the quality rating and priority levels for 2018 Census variables, such as age, sex, birthplace, and occupation.

## 2018 Census data user guide (second edition)
Provides information about collecting, processing, interpreting, and ways of using 2018 Census data.

## Processing and evaluating the quality of 2018 Census data
Describes how the 2018 Census data was processed and evaluated to produce a final dataset for public release.

## 2018 Census data quality management strategy

## Data quality assurance for 2018 Census
Outlines the quality rating scale and quality assurance framework used by Stats NZ to assess the quality of data from the 2018 Census.

## Overview of data quality ratings, interim coverage and response rates, and data sources for 2018 Census

## 2018 Census: Interim coverage rates, collection response rates, and data sources

## External data quality panel
The 2018 Census external data quality panel was established to provide independent advice on methodologies used for the 2018 Census. Find out more about the panel and their assessments of methods used for creating the 2018 Census dataset and quality of its variables.

## Implementing the recommendations of the 2018 External Data Quality Panel

## 2018 Census external data quality panel confirmed

## 2018 Census external data quality panel: Terms of reference
This panel will provide independent advice to the Government Statistician about the methodologies used to produce information from the 2018 Census based upon sound research and a strong evidence base.

## Initial Report of the 2018 Census External Data Quality Panel
Read the initial report of the 2018 Census external data quality panel.
